evidence: Multiple barrel/index files contain explanatory docblocks and notes but only re-export 1-3 symbols, adding ceremony with little signal (src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/ui/index.ts:1, src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotImagesEditor/hooks/index.ts:1, src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/sections/generation/index.ts:1, src/tools/travel-between-images/components/Timeline/TimelineContainer/index.tsx:1).

Migration-era compatibility scaffolding is still present as active surface area: backward-compat re-exports and moved-from commentary (src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/state/types.ts:2-11, src/shared/types/steerableMotion.ts:5-7).

State type file contains stale migration residue: comment says localOrderedShotImages removed, but action union still includes SET_LOCAL_ORDERED_SHOT_IMAGES payload (src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/state/types.ts:135, :163).

Formulaic explicit assertions in defaults add generated-style noise without runtime value (undefined as string | undefined, [] as Array<...>, false as boolean) (src/shared/lib/editVideoDefaults.ts:21-29).

findings.summary: Barrel modules are padded with generated-style commentary that restates obvious exports
evidence: Several index/barrel files add top-level explanatory blocks and 'Note:' comments while only exporting symbols.

Example: TimelineContainer index includes architecture prose and internal-component note around a single default export and one type export (src/tools/travel-between-images/components/Timeline/TimelineContainer/index.tsx:1-15).
findings.suggestion: Trim barrel files to minimal exports; keep only comments that encode non-obvious constraints. Remove restating headers/notes from index files and move architecture documentation to the concrete implementation file or dedicated docs.

findings.summary: ShotEditor state types still carry migration compatibility scaffolding and stale markers
evidence: state/types.ts keeps a 'RE-EXPORTS FROM SHARED' backward-compat block (src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/state/types.ts:2-11).
shared/types/steerableMotion.ts still encodes move-history commentary ('Moved from ...') as in-file migration narrative (src/shared/types/steerableMotion.ts:5-7).

The same state/types file has contradictory residue: comment says localOrderedShotImages removed, yet action union still defines SET_LOCAL_ORDERED_SHOT_IMAGES (src/tools/travel-between-images/components/ShotEditor/state/types.ts:135, :163).
findings.suggestion: Finish the migration by updating remaining imports to shared types, then delete compatibility re-exports and move-history comments. Remove or reintroduce the localOrderedShotImages action consistently so comments and type surface match.

findings.summary: Defaults object uses unnecessary explicit assertions that read as generated boilerplate
evidence: editVideoDefaults.ts repeatedly asserts obvious literals (`undefined as string | undefined`, `[] as Array<...>`, `false as boolean`) instead of typing the container once (src/shared/lib/editVideoDefaults.ts:21-29).
The surrounding file already exports a derived type (`EditVideoSettings = typeof editVideoSettings.defaults`), so repeated local assertions increase noise more than type safety.
findings.suggestion: Type the `defaults` object once (for example with a dedicated interface/type and `satisfies`) and remove per-field assertions. Keep literals plain unless a specific inference bug requires a targeted cast.
